executives.name: Christian Klein
executives.background: Christian Klein is CEO and a member of the Executive Board of SAP SE. He has been with SAP since 1999 and has held various positions, including Chief Operating Officer and Chief Controlling Officer.

executives.name: Dominik Asam
executives.background: Dominik Asam is CFO and a member of the Executive Board of SAP SE. Before joining SAP, he was CFO of Airbus and Infineon Technologies.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer / Member of the Executive Board

executives.name: Muhammad Alam
executives.background: Muhammad Alam is a member of the Executive Board of SAP SE, leading SAP Product Engineering. He joined SAP in 2022 from Microsoft.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Executive Board, SAP Product Engineering
Member of the Executive Board (Head of SAP Product & Engineering)

executives.name: Juergen Mueller
executives.background: Juergen Mueller was the Chief Technology Officer and a member of the Executive Board. He left the company in September 2024.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Technology Officer (CTO) and Member of the Executive Board

executives.name: Thomas Saueressig
executives.background: Thomas Saueressig is a member of the Executive Board of SAP SE, leading Customer Services & Delivery. He has been with SAP since 2004.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Executive Board, Customer Services & Delivery
Member of the Executive Board, SAP Product Engineering

executives.name: Adaire Fox-Martin
executives.background: Adaire Fox-Martin has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer since June 2024. Prior to joining Equinix, she served as President of Google Cloud Go-to-Market and Head of Google Ireland from July 2021 to June 2024. Before Google, she had a 13-year career at SAP, where she held various leadership roles, including Executive Board Member and President of Global Customer Success.

executives.name: Ajei Gopal
executives.background: Ajei Gopal is the President and CEO of ANSYS, Inc. and serves as an independent member of the SAP Supervisory Board.

executives.name: Bill McDermott
executives.background: Bill McDermott has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since November 2019. From 2010 to 2019, Mr. McDermott served as CEO of SAP SE. He joined SAP in 2002 and held various leadership positions before becoming CEO.

executives.name: Jim Hagemann Snabe
executives.background: Chairman of the Supervisory Board of Siemens AG. Former Co-CEO of SAP SE. He serves on various boards including Northvolt AB.

executives.name: Pekka Ala-Pietilä
executives.background: Pekka Ala-Pietilä is the Chairman of the Supervisory Board. He was formerly the President of Nokia Corporation.

executives.name: Punit Renjen
executives.background: Punit Renjen was the former CEO of Deloitte Global and was designated to succeed Hasso Plattner but stepped down before taking the role.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Supervisory Board / Deputy Chairperson

executives.name: Xiaoqun Clever
executives.background: Xiaoqun Clever has over 20 years' experience in technology and digital transformation. She has held senior executive roles at SAP SE and Ringier AG.

tenure_dates.title: EVP, President of Labs China; COO of Tech & Innovation

board_of_directors.name: Pekka Ala-Pietilä
board_of_directors.background: Pekka Ala-Pietilä is the Chairman of the Supervisory Board. He was formerly the President of Nokia Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Hasso Plattner
board_of_directors.background: Hasso Plattner is a co-founder of SAP and served as Chairman of the Supervisory Board until May 2024.

board_of_directors.name: Ajei Gopal
board_of_directors.background: Ajei Gopal is the President and CEO of ANSYS, Inc. and serves as an independent member of the SAP Supervisory Board.

board_of_directors.name: Punit Renjen
board_of_directors.background: Punit Renjen was the former CEO of Deloitte Global and was designated to succeed Hasso Plattner but stepped down before taking the role.
